jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer with 2+ years of experience in React and CSS. You will build responsive UIs, collaborate with designers, and optimize performance.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: Join our growing team to build full-stack features using React and Node.js. Work on real products used by thousands of users.

jobs.title: Java Backend Developer
jobs.description: Develop and maintain enterprise-grade Java backend services. Work with Spring Boot and SQL databases in an agile environment.

jobs.title: Data Analyst Intern
jobs.description: Analyze large datasets, create dashboards, and generate insights for business decision-making. Python and SQL experience required.

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Design beautiful user interfaces for web and mobile apps. Strong Figma skills and a good portfolio are essential.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and deployment processes. AWS and Docker experience is a must.
